Utility for flashing Pebble BigBoards over SWD, with installation via PyPi and support for STM32/SWD devices.

# Purpose
`pblprog` is a utility for flashing Pebble BigBoards using the Serial Wire Debug (SWD) interface. It can be installed from PyPi under the package name `pebble.programmer`. The utility supports STM32/SWD-based Pebble BigBoards, with current support for `silk_bb` and `robert_bb` devices.
